text:
Also tried with 93amd64 with poudriere
got another error
[00:13:53] ====>> [01][00:00:04] Finished build of www/spdylay: Ignored: spdylay requires OpenSSL 1.0.1+
[00:13:53] ====>> [01][00:00:04] Skipping build of www/nghttp2: Dependent port www/spdylay ignored

maybe this should be another PR with www/spdylay.
